Please describe the problem you found in detail.

## Steps to Reproduce

Describe how we can make this issue happen on our side.

## Expected Behavior

Explain what should have happened if the application worked correctly.

## Actual Behavior

Explain what actually happened, including any error messages or unexpected results.

## Environment Info

Provide details about the environment where you ran into this problem.

- Operating system:
- Browser:
- Hardware setup (if relevant):
